summary: The implementation, RLS boundary inspection, lint, and production build pass, but the required authenticated browser interaction evidence is unavailable to this reviewer.

evidence: app/page.tsx derives filteredArchiveRecords from file name, category, document type, amount, summary, and extracted OCR text.
app/page.tsx combines status, category, document-type, and text predicates, and clearArchiveFilters resets all four control states.
Filtering is applied only to the records array. fetchArchiveRows still requests the authenticated Supabase archives endpoint with the current access token; no new cross-user query path was added.
The new controls and empty state provide Chinese and English inline labels.
The diff is limited to the archive client UI and control documents; authentication, upload, OCR, DeepSeek route, RLS schema, and API configuration were not changed.
The required authenticated browser search, combined-filter, clear, and refresh observation could not be performed in the current execution environment.

issues.problem: No direct authenticated browser evidence covers search, combined filters, clear filters, refresh, and user-private results.
issues.required_evidence: Run the five manual authenticated checks listed in the task brief and provide the observed results or a screenshot.

required_action: Obtain authenticated browser evidence for AC-6 before accepting this feature.
